{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201508006CCDEDB39199CFE89708"}"},"total":155},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611036866561934105","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉挺好看的，只要后面没女主或者暧昧关系就。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772085658,"group_id":"7603673437558541336","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1+LZ+aKiAGcXg3d8ZXGS84DLX4TmyTNGlRP1r7oTSh+","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2807503192065450","user_name":"用户28075031"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2807503192065450","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7603673437558541336","book_info":{"abstract":"前世是王牌狙击手的陆峰，穿越成高考250分的网瘾废物。
刚穿越就被老爹用皮带抽醒——只因原主高考250，沉迷游戏，是全家耻辱。
第一天就被丢进全军最狠的边防团。教官冷眼放话：“关系户？老子专治少爷病！”
可前世是超级兵王的陆峰却是就地崛起！当别的兵还在练队列，陆峰已经1500米外一枪打爆移动靶。新兵连就把教官打自闭了。
紧急拉动，他第一个全装到位；战术演练，他一个人端了全连指挥所。
领导怀疑人生：“这哪是少爷兵？这特么是兵王苗子！”
直到全军大比武，陆峰扛着狙击枪点名全场精锐。全军彻底疯狂！
两年后，老父亲开车去接自己的废物儿子退伍。却发现，废物儿子，已经成为一名上校！
“老爹，你那点财产自己留着吧。”
“你儿子我可是要当将军的人！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/11c5a8c52bbb0f639c3f6ccc3d76799a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"赢无欲","author_id":"","book_id":"7603673437558541336","book_name":"参军第一年，国家派战机接我去授勋","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"19.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7603685253122640920","read_count":"193561","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"309774"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"124","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,穿越,特种兵,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/11c5a8c52bbb0f639c3f6ccc3d76799a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779174480&x-signature=bLuv61BONOXG0TiP3j7eFwdFs7Q%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"22"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201508006CCDEDB39199CFE89708"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":20,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3996,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":6752},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_sti
